chunks.text: Technical Reports - Jaijeet Roychowdhury. A Study on Advanced Ising Machine Designs: BLIM, King's Graph Mapping, and OIM Chips (EECS-2024-95) Jui-Hsin Hung and Jaijeet Roychowdhury. Ising Machines: Theory and Practice (EECS-2023-138) Naomi Sagan and Jaijeet Roychowdhury.

Oscillator-Based Potts Machine (OPM) for the Implementation of the Vector Potts Model (EECS-2022-198) Jaijeet Roychowdhury and Sayan Seal. New Generation Verilog-A Model Development Tools: VAPP and VALint (EECS-2018-89) A. Gokcen Mahmutoglu, Xufeng Wang and Jaijeet Roychowdhury.
Modelling Optical Devices and Systems in MAPP (EECS-2017-160) Tianshi Wang and Jaijeet Roychowdhury.
